mapper.select: select id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, like_count from posts where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

select id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, like_count from posts
deleted_at is null
and ( created_at < #{cursorCreatedAt} or (created_at = #{cursorCreatedAt} and id < #{cursorId}) )
order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update posts set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update posts set like_count = like_count - 1 where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null and like_count > 0
